title: Meisha Stainless Steel Teaspoons, Set of 12, Silver Harley Pattern Tea Spoons Use for Home, Kitchen or Restaurant - Everyday Parish Cutlery
features: 【PREMIUM QUALITY】This set includes 12 teaspoons made from sturdy, polished stainless steel, with comfortable, slimline pattern metal handles.
【EXQUISITE】Mirror polishing surface keeps the spoon shinning. And the spoon is dishwasher safe and easy to clean.

【IDEAL FOR EVERY OCCASION】These are ideal for day to day use, suitable for home, kitchen, wedding, party, café, restaurant, hotel, etc. It’s easy to match your existing cutlery, a good helper for life.
【DIMENTIONS】The length of spoon is 143mm (about 5.6in) which is perfect for most of the tea and coffee mugs.
【Worry-Free Guarantee】: Your satisfaction is our highest priority, if you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. We will help to meet your satisfaction.
description: Meisha 12-Piece Tea Spoons for Home and Restaurant Exquisite craft Smooth edge with no rough spots, matte finish surface machining, anti rust and non toxic, medium weight and proper thickness ensure comfortable in use. Durable & Easy to Wash Made from 18/0 stainless steel flatware is easily clean up in the dishwasher, and last for long use indefinitely. Modern and elegant design Simple and classic look, mirror finish make your tableware different. The superior quality makes this silverware set suitable for kitchens, restaurants, events, and everyday meals. Features Material: Premium Stainless Steel Color: Silver Package List: 12 tea spoons Length: 5.6inch (14.3cm), Weight: 0.63oz/unit (17.8g) Warm tips: 1.Do not leave your silverware sitting in water, as soaking can permanently damage the metal, and please make sure your cutlery is completely dry before you store it. 2.Please do not use steel wool, scouring pads or sharp objects to avoid scratches.
